judgment.summary: ServiceNow maintains high gross margins and robust free cash flow with an attractive growth-adjusted valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.97 vs estimate 0.97 (in line), with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-22.
positives: PEG ratio 0.86 — suggests the company is undervalued relative to its growth profile.
Forward P/E 18.01 vs Trailing P/E 53.87 — implies significant expected earnings expansion.
Gross margin 76.6% — reflects high-quality, scalable software economics.
Free cash flow (TTM) $5.11B — demonstrates robust cash generation capabilities.
Total cash $5.18B vs Total debt $2.43B — represents a strong net cash position.
negatives: Current ratio 0.84 and Quick ratio 0.69 — indicate potential short-term liquidity constraints.
Earnings growth 2.3% — lags significantly behind the 22.1% revenue growth.
Operating margin 13.3% — shows a notable gap between gross and operating profitability.

news.paragraph: ServiceNow has partnered with Accenture to launch an engineering program focused on scaling agentic AI for enterprise clients. This development highlights the company's strategic expansion into AI-driven enterprise services. There are no imminent earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the current news cycle.

headlines.title: ServiceNow (NOW), Accenture Launch Engineering Program to Scale Agentic AI for Enterprises
